IGUI_VehicleNameM1A1_Tooltip:
U.S. Army Main Battle Tank
Devastating to zombies, but you still need to pay attention to the track condition
M1A1 has a minimum of 50 status protection
To repair to 100, you must issue orders to your crew inside the vehicle
IGUI_MainGun_M830A1_Tooltip: M830A1 is the main gun of the M1A1, its rate of fire is 1.5 times that of the M1A1, but its range is only half of the M1A1
IGUI_ABFP_toolip: These points are interchangeable with the Automatic Turret Module points
IGUI_VehiclePartAmmoCacheBig_Tooltip: Extended Ammunition Rack, allows you to carry more ammunition
IGUI_ChronoSphere_Tooltip: Technology from another timeline, research to access the RV space
IGUI_EngineUpdate_Tooltip: Engine Upgrade, research to increase vehicle acceleration
IGUI_FilterUpdate_Tooltip: Air Filter, research to improve fuel efficiency
IGUI_TrackUpdate_Tooltip: Track Upgrade, research to increase resistance to infantry units
IGUI_BrakeUpdate_Tooltip: Brake Upgrade, research to improve vehicle braking effect
IGUI_TigerShovel_Tooltip: Dozer Blade, research to improve vehicle obstacle crossing ability
IGUI_AnTiPersonnelMine_Tooltip: Anti-Personnel Bouncing Mine, deploy pre-installed anti-personnel bouncing mines
IGUI_AnotherMachineGunner_Tooltip: Additional Machine Gunner, adds an MG42 on the vehicle top, used by the vehicle's third crew member
IGUI_MainGun762mm_Tooltip: 7.62mm Machine Gun, extremely effective against infantry units
IGUI_MainGun792mm_Tooltip: 7.92mm Machine Gun, extremely effective against infantry units
IGUI_Vehicle_art_support_Tooltip: Artillery Support, call in nearby available artillery units for support, research to gain one use
IGUI_Vehicle_MoreArmor_Tooltip: Additional Armor, add armor plates to both sides of the vehicle
IGUI_Vehicle_AirSupport_Tooltip: Air Support, call in nearby available air support units for support, research to gain one use
IGUI_Vehicle_TurretLight_Tooltip: Turret Spotlight, provides illumination when aiming, press V to activate
IGUI_MainGun_SprgrL_45_Tooltip: Sprgr.L/4.5 High Explosive Shell, causes large area damage, less effective against buildings
IGUI_Vehicle_NightVersion_Tooltip: Night Vision, increases night target acquisition capability when activated
IGUI_BetterHUD_Tooltip: Improved HUD, adds data display to the HUD
IGUI_ResearchBefore: You must research the upper-level technology
IGUI_PanzerCrew_FastShootMG_Desc: Quick Fire, reduces machine gun firing interval
IGUI_PanzerCrew_BattleRepair_Desc:
Increases repair speed during maintenance
At max level, allows repair while moving
IGUI_NoDrivePanzer: I need to learn how to drive a tank
IGUI_MainGun125mm_Tooltip: 125mm Gun, extremely effective against hard targets
IGUI_MainGun120mm_Tooltip: 120mm Gun, extremely effective against hard targets
IGUI_MainGun_30mmAP_Tooltip: AP Chain, effective against armored targets
IGUI_MainGun_30mmHE_Tooltip: HE Chain, effective against personnel and light armored targets
IGUI_MainGun_Rocket_Tooltip: Rocket, effective against personnel and light armored targets
IGUI_MainGun_AnTiTankMissile_Tooltip: Anti-Tank Missile, effective against armored targets
IGUI_WarnSystem_Tooltip: Warning System, issues an alarm when the vehicle encounters danger
IGUI_Vehicle_Compressor_Tooltip: Test and calibrate the compressor to enhance engine performance
IGUI_Vehicle_Rotorblade_Tooltip: Test and calibrate the rotor blade to enhance flight performance
IGUI_Vehicle_Engine_Tooltip: Install a new engine to reduce noise
IGUI_NightLight_Tooltip: Night Light, provides illumination at night
IGUI_MainGun_RocketNest_Tooltip: Many rockets, effective against personnel and light armored targets
IGUI_MainGun_MachineGunTable_Tooltip: Improves infantry capabilities, the more mounts the higher the damage
IGUI_MainGun30mmM230E_Tooltip: 30mm M230E Cannon, effective against armored targets
IGUI_ItemRarityUI_ShowRarityColumnToolti: Show or hide the rarity column in the inventory panel.
IGUI_ItemRarityUI_ModDescription: Configure the rarity display in your inventory.

IGUI_LockpickFail: The lock didn't budge. I should try again.

IGUI_First_Toggle_On: I forgot to toggle it on first.
IGUI_No_Cassette: Oops! I need to put a cassette in first.
IGUI_Cassette_Yet: I found an old cassette inside!

IGUI_PlayDOOM_EndText: Press ENTER to select - ESC to exit
IGUI_PlayDOOM_GameOver: G A M E  O V E R
IGUI_PlayDOOM_Defeated: D E F E A T E D !
IGUI_Vac2_DisguiseAboutExpired: My disguise is about to expire!
IGUI_BID_Options_DisplaySettings: Choose what to display in the expanded view in the inventory
IGUI_BID_Options_ShowNutritionist_Toolti: Show calories, carbs, proteins and fats (requires Nutritionist trait)
IGUI_BID_Options_UsesSortDir: Uses Sort Direction (number of uses left)
IGUI_VLQ_1_Desc_q1s001: You wake up with a hammering headache. After a long moment of observation, you realize the world you once knew has collapsed. Everything around has turned into soulless corpses staggering on the streets. Some, starving, are devouring chunks of fresh flesh... <LINE> <LINE> No matter what, you must survive first. <LINE> <LINE> The most essential thing for survival is water. Find some water to prepare for the survival journey ahead.
IGUI_VLQ_1_Desc_q1s002: The next important thing is food. Search for food around here.
IGUI_VLQ_1_Task_q1s003: Task: Find your brother at Riverside High School
IGUI_VLQ_1_Desc_q1s003: You remember your younger brother, the only one who ever cared about you, who is studying at the high school in Riverside. Even though your own survival is already a problem, you still want to go to that school to look for him. You whisper... younger brother, don't die.
IGUI_VLQ_1_NPCTalk_q1s003: ...through the conversation, you learn that this woman is the vice principal of this school. She says she remembers your brother. Because 5 days before the outbreak, the city police and a group of strangers came to the school to collect blood samples from all students, then took your brother and 4 other students away. She doesn't know anything else. <LINE> <LINE> Perhaps you need to go to the Riverside Police Department for more information.
IGUI_VLQ_1_Task_q1s004: Task: Find clues at the Riverside Police Department
IGUI_VLQ_1_Desc_q1s004: ...through the conversation, you learn that this woman is the vice principal of this school. She says she remembers your brother. Because 5 days before the outbreak, the city police and a group of strangers came to the school to collect blood samples from all students, then took your brother and 4 other students away. She doesn't know anything else. <LINE> <LINE> Perhaps you need to go to the Riverside Police Department for more information.
IGUI_VLQ_1_NPCTalk_q1s004: ...you ask this police officer about the events 5 days before the outbreak. He says only the Police Chief knows the details; officers like him only follow orders from above. <LINE> <LINE> You ask about the Chief, and he says the Chief was not at the station when the apocalypse happened, then gives you the Chief's home address.
IGUI_VLQ_1_Task_q1s005: Task: Find clues at the Police Chief’s house
IGUI_VLQ_1_Desc_q1s005: ...you ask this police officer about the events 5 days before the outbreak. He says only the Police Chief knows the details; officers like him only follow orders from above. <LINE> <LINE> You ask about the Chief, and he says the Chief was not at the station when the apocalypse happened, then gives you the Chief's home address.
IGUI_VLQ_1_NPCTalk_q1s005: ...the man in police uniform gives no response, showing very strange behavior...
IGUI_VLQ_1_NotePage1_1_q1s005: ...the main content is that the Facility Commander at the Military Research Facility sent this to the City Police Chief. The document requests the police force to immediately coordinate with the team being deployed. The time is 5 days before the outbreak.
IGUI_VLQ_1_Task_q1s006: Task: Find your brother at the Military Research Facility
IGUI_VLQ_1_Desc_q1s006: From the Official Request for Coordination, you learn that the team that took your brother belongs to the Military Research Facility located in Hog Wallow Forest. <LINE> <LINE> To find your brother, you must go to the Military Research Facility.
IGUI_VLQ_1_NotePage1_1_q1s006: ...inside is your brother's name, room B14-15, registered 5 days before the outbreak.
IGUI_VLQ_1_NotePage2_1_q1s006: ...inside is an introduction to the current facility. This is a combined research and military facility, also known as the National Microbiology and Biotechnology Research Facility No. 22, abbreviated as NMB Research Facility No. 22. It specializes in researching and applying microbiology to enhance human physical capabilities.
IGUI_VLQ_1_NoteTitle3_q1s006: Research Report on Super Soldier Serum No. 1 - Week 51
IGUI_VLQ_1_NotePage3_1_q1s006: ...inside is a report on research into enhancing human strength and fitness, currently in the human testing phase.
IGUI_VLQ_1_NoteTitle4_q1s006: Blood and DNA Test Report on Test Subject No. 2508
IGUI_VLQ_1_NotePage4_1_q1s006: ...inside, your brother's name is mentioned, labeled as 'test subject No. 2508'. <LINE> The conclusion states that subject No. 2508 is a special subject, suitable for multiple research programs including: Super Soldier No. 1, No. 2, and No. 4.
IGUI_VLQ_1_NoteTitle5_q1s006: Request Transfer Test Subject No. 2508 Document
IGUI_VLQ_1_NotePage5_1_q1s006: ...the main content states that the Dignitary Protection Team of the Louisville Metro Police Department will receive and transfer test subject No. 2508 to Finnegan Research Group in Louisville to evaluate suitability for research projects beyond Super Soldier. The time is 1 day before the outbreak. Transportation is by specialized vehicles of the Louisville Police Department and the Dignitary Protection Team, license plates: xxx...
IGUI_VLQ_1_Task_q1s007: Task: Find your brother at Finnegan Research Group
IGUI_VLQ_1_Desc_q1s007: ...from the transfer document and the test report, you learn that your brother was taken to the Finnegan Research Group in Louisville.
IGUI_VLQ_1_NPCTalk_q1s007: ...through the conversation, you learn that she is a research scientist at this facility. She states that no agency or test subject has come here between the time you mentioned and now. <LINE> <LINE> Go to the Louisville Metro Police Department to find more clues.
IGUI_VLQ_1_Task_q1s008: Task: Go to the Louisville Metro Police Department to find clues
IGUI_VLQ_1_Desc_q1s008: ...through the conversation, you learn that she is a research scientist at this facility. She states that no agency or test subject has come here between the time you mentioned and now. <LINE> <LINE> Go to the Louisville Metro Police Department to find more clues.
IGUI_VLQ_1_NPCTalk_q1s008: ...through the conversation, you learn that he is a Lieutenant at this station. He knows about the transfer mission from the Military Research Facility, but the unit dispatched was ambushed by a group of strangers. The station sent reinforcements, but no updates ever came because the outbreak prevented them from reaching the site. He does not know the exact location of the ambush. <LINE> <LINE> Hint: You can search along the roads from Military Research Facility to Finnegan Research Group
IGUI_VLQ_1_Task_q1s009: Task: Find the location where the D.P.T was ambushed
IGUI_VLQ_1_Desc_q1s009: ...through the conversation, you learn that he is a Lieutenant at this station. He knows about the transfer mission from the Military Research Facility, but the unit dispatched was ambushed by a group of strangers. The station sent reinforcements, but no updates ever came because the outbreak prevented them from reaching the site. He does not know the exact location of the ambush. <LINE> <LINE> Hint: You can search along the roads from Military Research Facility to Finnegan Research Group
IGUI_VLQ_1_Task_q1s010: Task: Find clues at the scene
IGUI_VLQ_1_Desc_q1s010: You find the location where the Dignitary Protection Team was ambushed by the uniforms of the bodies on the ground and the matching vehicle plates listed in the transfer document. You feel worried when you see that all of them are lying completely motionless.
IGUI_VLQ_1_Task_q1s011: Task: Search for clues about the keyword MUL
IGUI_VLQ_1_Desc_q1s011: There is no one left alive around you. You feel a faint glimmer of hope when you realize your brother is not among the dead here. The only clue is a hastily written note in blood with three letters: MUL
IGUI_VLQ_2_Desc_q1s012: You discover a laboratory beneath the Muldraugh Police Department. It seems there may still be someone alive down here. <LINE> <LINE> If you don't find anyone, you might need to come back later.
IGUI_VLQ_2_NPCTalk_q1s012: ...through the conversation, you learn that the man is Dr. Venter, the owner of this laboratory. <LINE> <LINE> You ask about your brother, but he shakes his head, saying he has never seen anyone matching your description. Instead, he is worried because his assistant went out to gather food more than a day ago and has yet to return — she would normally be back within the day. He hopes you can help find her. Dr. Venter believes she is likely still wandering around food stores in the town, as she mentioned there was still plenty of food left somewhere nearby.
IGUI_VLQ_2_Task_q1s013: Task: Help Dr. Venter find his assistant
IGUI_VLQ_2_Desc_q1s013: ...through the conversation, you learn that the man is Dr. Venter, the owner of this laboratory. <LINE> <LINE> You ask about your brother, but he shakes his head, saying he has never seen anyone matching your description. Instead, he is worried because his assistant went out to gather food more than a day ago and has yet to return — she would normally be back within the day. He hopes you can help find her. Dr. Venter believes she is likely still wandering around food stores in the town, as she mentioned there was still plenty of food left somewhere nearby.
IGUI_VLQ_2_NPCTalk_q1s013: ...through the conversation, you learn that she is Dr. Bassler, Dr. Venter’s assistant. While searching for food, she accidentally made a loud noise, attracting too many zombies and forcing her to hide here until they dispersed. <LINE> <LINE> You ask about your brother, but Dr. Bassler has no clues at all. Before leaving, she thanks you, the area has become much safer — and says she will return to the laboratory immediately.
IGUI_VLQ_2_Task_q1s014: Task: Talk to Dr. Venter at the laboratory
IGUI_VLQ_2_Desc_q1s014: ...through the conversation, you learn that she is Dr. Bassler, Dr. Venter’s assistant. While searching for food, she accidentally made a loud noise that attracted too many zombies and was forced to hide here until they dispersed. <LINE> <LINE> You ask about your brother, but Dr. Bassler has no clues at all. Before leaving, she thanks you, the area has become much safer — and says she will return to the laboratory immediately.
IGUI_VLQ_2_NPCTalk_q1s014: ...Dr. Venter and Dr. Bassler express their gratitude to you. It seems they now consider you a friend, so they share more. <LINE> <LINE> Both of them belong to an organization researching biotechnology that enhance human physical abilities, and this laboratory was provided by that organization. Since the outbreak, all support from headquarters has been disrupted, and it seems something has happened there as well. Dr. Venter and his assistant have to manage everything themselves; many things that used to rely on headquarters have now become very difficult, especially since the assistant is a woman. <LINE> <LINE> You are the first survivor they’ve encountered since the city was overrun by zombies, and Dr. Venter feels you are trustworthy. He hopes you can help during this time and promises worthy rewards that will greatly benefit survival. <LINE> <LINE> If you agree, talk to him again.
IGUI_VLQ_2_Task_q1s015: Task: Request for help from Dr. Venter
IGUI_VLQ_2_Desc_q1s015: ...Dr. Venter and Dr. Bassler express their gratitude to you. It seems they now consider you a friend, so they share more. <LINE> <LINE> Both of them belong to an organization researching biotechnology that enhance human physical abilities, and this laboratory was provided by that organization. Since the outbreak, all support from headquarters has been disrupted, and it seems something has happened there as well. Dr. Venter and his assistant have to manage everything themselves; many things that used to rely on headquarters have now become very difficult, especially since the assistant is a woman. <LINE> <LINE> You are the first survivor they’ve encountered since the city was overrun by zombies, and Dr. Venter feels you are trustworthy. He hopes you can help during this time and promises worthy rewards that will greatly benefit survival. <LINE> <LINE> If you agree, talk to him again.
IGUI_VLQ_2_NPCTalk_q1s015: ...Dr. Venter is very happy that you agreed to help him. He says Dr. Bassler had to abandon all the food when escaping from the zombies, so the food supplies here are running low. <LINE> <LINE> Dr. Venter asks you to find food for him and his assistant (total reduces 1400 hunger).
IGUI_VLQ_2_Task_q1s016: Task: Help Dr. Venter search for food
IGUI_VLQ_2_Desc_q1s016: ...Dr. Venter is very happy that you agreed to help him. He says Dr. Bassler had to abandon all the food when escaping from the zombies, so the food supplies here are running low. <LINE> <LINE> Dr. Venter asks you to find food for him and his assistant (total reduces 1400 hunger).
IGUI_VLQ_2_NPCTalk_q1s016: ...Dr. Venter thanks you for the food you brought. He says they need to stockpile more water and asks you to bring at least 30 liters.
IGUI_VLQ_2_Notification1_q1s016: You need to carry the food with you to give it to Dr. Venter. He will not take rotten food, dangerous raw food, or poisonous food.
IGUI_VLQ_2_Task_q1s017: Task: Help Dr. Venter search for drinking water
IGUI_VLQ_2_Desc_q1s017: ...Dr. Venter thanks you for the food you brought. He says they need to stockpile more water and asks you to bring at least 30 liters.
IGUI_VLQ_2_NPCTalk_q1s017: ...Dr. Venter thanks you for the drinking water you brought. Now, food and water are sufficient for a long period. He asks for your help with research related to the zombies. <LINE> <LINE> Dr. Venter asks you to collect 15 blood samples from zombies. He also gives you the tools and detailed instructions on how to draw blood. <LINE> <LINE> Hint: You need an Empty Syringe to collect a Blood Sample from a zombie's corpse. Each zombie can only be sampled once.
IGUI_VLQ_2_Notification1_q1s017: You need to carry water with you to give it to Dr. Venter. He will not take tainted water.
IGUI_VLQ_2_Task_q1s018: Task: Collect 15 blood samples from zombies
IGUI_VLQ_2_Desc_q1s018: ...Dr. Venter thanks you for the drinking water you brought. Now, food and water are sufficient for a long period. He asks for your help with research related to the zombies. <LINE> <LINE> Dr. Venter asks you to collect 15 blood samples from zombies. He also gives you the tools and detailed instructions on how to draw blood. <LINE> <LINE> Hint: You need an Empty Syringe to collect a Blood Sample from a zombie's corpse. Each zombie can only be sampled once.
IGUI_VLQ_2_NPCTalk_q1s018: ...Dr. Venter takes the blood samples you brought and says he needs some time to study them.
IGUI_VLQ_2_Notification1_q1s018: You need an Empty Syringe to collect a Blood Sample from a zombie's corpse. Each zombie can only be sampled once.
IGUI_VLQ_2_Task_q1s019: Task: Wait for Dr. Venter to study the samples
IGUI_VLQ_2_Desc_q1s019: ...Dr. Venter takes the blood samples you brought and says he needs some time to study them.
IGUI_VLQ_2_Notification1_q1s019: Dr. Venter seems too busy with the research, come back later.
IGUI_VLQ_2_Notification2_q1s019: The doctor is waiting for you, talk to him again.
IGUI_VLQ_2_Task_q1s020: Task: Talk to Dr. Venter at the laboratory
IGUI_VLQ_2_Desc_q1s020: ...One day has passed since you gave the zombie blood samples to Dr. Venter. Perhaps he will need more assistance.
IGUI_VLQ_2_NPCTalk_q1s020: ...Dr. Venter says that this time he needs 15 living tissue samples from still-active zombies. He gives you the tools and very detailed instructions on how to collect living tissue. <LINE> <LINE> Hint: samples can only be collected when the zombie is restrained on the ground.
IGUI_VLQ_2_Task_q1s021: Task: Collect 15 specimens from active zombies
IGUI_VLQ_2_Desc_q1s021: ...Dr. Venter says that this time he needs 15 living tissue samples from still-active zombies. He gives you the tools and very detailed instructions on how to collect living tissue. <LINE> <LINE> Hint: samples can only be collected when the zombie is restrained on the ground.
IGUI_VLQ_2_NPCTalk_q1s021: ...After receiving the samples, Dr. Venter no longer keeps the polite tone. He gives you a vial of serum and says it enhances the body's strength, a result of a previous research project. It has almost no side effects. <LINE> <LINE> The doctor hopes it will help you, his friend. Then he continues burying himself in his research.
IGUI_VLQ_2_Notification1_q1s021: You need an Empty Specimen Container to collect a Zombie’s Specimen from an active zombie. Each zombie can only be sampled once.
IGUI_VLQ_2_Task_q1s022: Task: Wait for Dr. Venter to study the specimens
IGUI_VLQ_2_Desc_q1s022: ...After receiving the samples, Dr. Venter no longer keeps the polite tone. He gives you a vial of serum and says it enhances the body's strength, a result of a previous research project. It has almost no side effects. <LINE> <LINE> The doctor hopes it will help you, his friend. Then he continues burying himself in his research.
IGUI_VLQ_2_Task_q1s023: Task: Drink with your old man friend
IGUI_VLQ_2_Desc_q1s023: ...You feel lost in your journey to find your younger brother. The world has changed, memories are fragmented, nameless sorrow and loneliness rise stronger and stronger. <LINE> <LINE> You want to find a friend to have a few drinks with. You think of Dr. Venter, your friend with white hair... Now you only need 2 bottles of alcohol.
IGUI_VLQ_2_NPCTalk_q1s023: ...Dr. Venter agrees immediately, without hesitation. The alcohol makes the conversation more open. <LINE> <LINE> You share your burdens, and the doctor also confides about himself. <LINE> <LINE> He was once the Chief Researcher at NMB Research Facility No. 20. Because of disagreements with colleagues, he left. As soon as he left, a man invited him to join the HGA organization and promised a private lab with everything he needed. He only cared about research, so he agreed and was brought here along with his female assistant whom he treats like a daughter. <LINE> <LINE> Here, he almost succeeded in creating a serum that comprehensively enhances human physical abilities. But because it is a synthetic serum, it caused many severe side effects, and a suitable subject resistant to all of them was required to complete it. Since no suitable subject had been found, the project had to be suspended. <LINE> <LINE> Until the zombies appeared, opening a new horizon for him...
IGUI_VLQ_2_Notification1_q1s023: You need 2 bottles/cans of alcoholic beverages to drink with Dr. Venter.
IGUI_VLQ_2_Task_q1s024: Task: Wait for Dr. Venter to study the specimens
IGUI_VLQ_2_Desc_q1s024: ...Resting after the drinking session helps relieve pressure and fatigue. Dr. Venter continues to dive into his research. This time, it may take longer.
IGUI_VLQ_2_Task_q1s025: Task: Talk to Dr. Venter at the laboratory
IGUI_VLQ_2_Desc_q1s025: ...Three days have passed since drinking with Dr. Venter. Perhaps he will need more assistance.
IGUI_VLQ_2_NPCTalk_q1s025: ...Dr. Venter says you arrived just in time, he needs 5 live rats for an experiment.
IGUI_VLQ_2_Desc_q1s026: ...Dr. Venter says you arrived just in time, he needs 5 live rats for an experiment.
IGUI_VLQ_2_NPCTalk_q1s026: ...After receiving the rats, Dr. Venter asks you to catch 3 live frogs.
IGUI_VLQ_2_Notification1_q1s026: Rats are often found in the city.
IGUI_VLQ_2_Desc_q1s027: ...After receiving the rats, Dr. Venter asks you to catch 3 live frogs.
IGUI_VLQ_2_NPCTalk_q1s027: ...After receiving the frogs, Dr. Venter asks you to catch 10 live leeches.
IGUI_VLQ_2_Notification1_q1s027: Frogs can be found in forests, fields, along riverbanks, lakes, or ponds.
IGUI_VLQ_2_Desc_q1s028: ...After receiving the frogs, Dr. Venter asks you to catch 10 live leeches.
IGUI_VLQ_2_NPCTalk_q1s028: ...Dr. Venter takes the leeches you brought. Then he becomes busy with research again.
IGUI_VLQ_2_Notification1_q1s028: Leeches can be found when fishing or using fish traps.
IGUI_VLQ_2_Task_q1s029: Task: Wait for Dr. Venter to conduct his research
IGUI_VLQ_2_Desc_q1s029: ...Dr. Venter takes the leeches you brought. Then he becomes busy with research again.
IGUI_VLQ_2_Task_q1s030: Task: Talk to Dr. Venter at the laboratory
IGUI_VLQ_2_Desc_q1s030: ...Three days have passed since giving the leeches to Dr. Venter. Perhaps he will need more assistance.
IGUI_VLQ_2_NPCTalk_q1s030: ...Dr. Venter says the food reserves are running low. He asks you to find more food again (total reduces 1500 hunger).
IGUI_VLQ_2_Task_q1s031: Task: Help Dr. Venter search for food
IGUI_VLQ_2_Desc_q1s031: ...Dr. Venter says the food reserves are running low. He asks you to find more food again (total reduces 1500 hunger).
IGUI_VLQ_2_NPCTalk_q1s031: ...Dr. Venter thanks you for the food you brought. He says he needs living tissue samples from someone in the process of turning into a zombie. He gives you tools and instructions on how to collect the specimen. <LINE> <LINE> Hint: You may randomly encounter survivors in cities. Some may be infected... others might not.
IGUI_VLQ_2_Notification1_q1s031: You need to carry the food with you to give it to Dr. Venter. He will not take rotten food, dangerous raw food, or poisonous food.
IGUI_VLQ_2_Task_q1s032: Task: Collect specimen from infected people
IGUI_VLQ_2_Desc_q1s032: ...Dr. Venter says he needs living tissue samples from someone who is in the process of turning into a zombie. He gives you tools and instructions on how to collect the specimen. <LINE> <LINE> Hint: You may randomly encounter survivors in cities. Some may be infected... others might not.
IGUI_VLQ_2_NPCTalk_q1s032: ...Dr. Venter is extremely grateful that you managed to obtain these valuable samples. They will be very useful for his research. He then returns to his work.
IGUI_VLQ_2_Notification1_q1s032: You may randomly encounter survivors in cities. Some may be infected... others might not.
IGUI_VLQ_2_Task_q1s033: Task: Wait for Dr. Venter to conduct his research
IGUI_VLQ_2_Desc_q1s033: ...Dr. Venter is extremely grateful that you managed to obtain these valuable samples. They will be very useful for his research. He then returns to his work.
IGUI_VLQ_2_Task_q1s034: Task: Talk to Dr. Venter at the laboratory
IGUI_VLQ_2_Desc_q1s034: ...Seven days have passed since your last assistance. Perhaps the doctor will need more assistance.
IGUI_VLQ_2_NPCTalk_q1s034: ...Dr. Venter says you arrived just in time. He has just created something very interesting. He starts pouring out a stream of technical jargon that you can’t understand at all. <LINE> <LINE> You look at what he points to — a golf-ball-sized mass that is moving and appears to be absorbing a small piece of flesh next to it. <LINE> <LINE> In the flood of scientific terms, you manage to catch one thing: this organism is extremely attracted to the virus the doctor recently extracted from zombies. Stunned, you ask whether it could attract zombies from all around the city. <LINE> <LINE> Both the doctor and his assistant freeze. He whispered unconsciously... the bigger the organism grows, the wider the attraction range becomes... and its current size is already far larger than when it was first formed... <LINE> <LINE> You realize the organism must be destroyed immediately. Let urge Dr. Venter to destroy the organism
IGUI_VLQ_2_Task_q1s035: Task: Urge Dr. Venter to destroy the organism
IGUI_VLQ_2_Desc_q1s035: ...Dr. Venter says you arrived just in time. He has just created something very interesting. He starts pouring out a stream of technical jargon that you can’t understand at all. <LINE> <LINE> You look at what he points to — a golf-ball-sized mass that is moving and appears to be absorbing a small piece of flesh next to it. <LINE> <LINE> In the flood of scientific terms, you manage to catch one thing: this organism is extremely attracted to the virus the doctor recently extracted from zombies. Stunned, you ask whether it could attract zombies from all around the city. <LINE> <LINE> Both the doctor and his assistant freeze. He whispered unconsciously... the bigger the organism grows, the wider the attraction range becomes... and its current size is already far larger than when it was first formed... <LINE> <LINE> You realize the organism must be destroyed immediately. Let urge Dr. Venter to destroy the organism
IGUI_VLQ_2_NPCTalk_q1s035: ...Just as you are about to speak to Dr. Venter, you hear the groans of zombies from above. Dr. Venter quickly says he will destroy the organism immediately and asks you to kill or lure the zombies away from the laboratory area. <LINE> <LINE> Hint: If you exit the game before completing the task, you must talk to the NPC again to reactivate this mission.
IGUI_VLQ_2_Notification1_q1s035: Dr. Venter asks you to kill or lure the zombies above away from the laboratory area. <LINE> <LINE> Note: If you exit the game before completing the task, you must talk to the NPC again to reactivate this mission.
IGUI_VLQ_2_Desc_q1s035_2: ...Just as you are about to speak to Dr. Venter, you hear the groans of zombies from above. Dr. Venter quickly says he will destroy the organism immediately and asks you to kill or lure the zombies away from the laboratory area. <LINE> <LINE> Hint: If you exit the game before completing the task, you must talk to the NPC again to reactivate this mission.
IGUI_VLQ_2_Task_q1s036: Task: Talk to Dr. Venter at the laboratory
IGUI_VLQ_2_Desc_q1s036: ...You have successfully protected the laboratory. Let's check on Dr. Venter's current situation.
IGUI_VLQ_2_NPCTalk_q1s036: ...Once again, the doctor is extremely grateful. Without you, both he and Dr. Bassler would have been in great danger. He says he needs some time to reorganize everything.
IGUI_VLQ_2_Task_q1s037: Task: Wait for Dr. Venter to to conduct his research
IGUI_VLQ_2_Desc_q1s037: ...Once again, the doctor is extremely grateful. Without you, both he and Dr. Bassler would have been in great danger. He says he needs some time to reorganize everything.
IGUI_VLQ_2_Task_q1s038: Task: Return to Dr. Venter’s laboratory
IGUI_VLQ_2_Desc_q1s038: ...Two days have passed since your last assistance. Perhaps the doctor will need more assistance.
IGUI_VLQ_2_Task_q1s039: Task: Investigate the situation inside the laboratory
IGUI_VLQ_2_Desc_q1s039: ...The laboratory seems to be missing many things. Check around to see what happened.
IGUI_VLQ_2_NotePage1_1_q1s039: ...In the letter, Dr. Venter says that headquarters has sent people to escort him to a safer location. Because he had to leave urgently, he couldn't wait for you and had to depart first. He left behind a vial of fitness-boosting serum that he found while packing. <LINE> The doctor seems excited to reveal that headquarters has found a suitable test subject for the previous research. He hopes you can find him in xxx city (To be updated), a location now fully controlled by the organization...(continued on page 2)
IGUI_VLQ_2_NotePage1_2_q1s039: ...Out of friendship and gratitude, he hopes you will come. As the second assistant he reported to the organization, it won’t be difficult for you to find him once you arrive in the city. <LINE> The doctor also says he will ask the organization to help you look for your younger brother, after all, more person searching means more chance.
IGUI_VLQ_2_Desc_q1s040: ...Additional missions will be added depending on feedback about the mod...
IGUI_VLQ_TipShowQuestScreen: (Double click on the quest to show/hide the quest on the screen)
IGUI_VLQ_NPCFlee_1: Your actions make the people around you feel uneasy. They temporarily leave and may return later.
IGUI_VLQ_NPCFlee_2: The NPC’s location is not safe. They temporarily leave and may return once the area is no longer dangerous.
IGUI_VLQ_NotHaveEmptySpecimenContainer: do not have Empty Specimen Container
